briefdescription.para: Secure chunk size 32K.
PDI source JTAG.
PDI source QSPI24.
PDI source QSPI32.
PDI source SDLS_B0.
PDI source EMMC0.
PDI source SD_B1.
PDI source EMMC1.
PDI source USB.
PDI source OSPI.
PDI source SBI.
PDI source SMAP.
PDI source PCIE.
PDI source SDLS_B1.
PDI source DDR.
PDI source Image Store.
PDI source invalid.
APU cluster 0.
APU cluster 1.
APU cluster 2.
APU cluster 3.
APU core 0.
APU core 1.
APU core 2.
APU core 3.
RPU cluster A.
RPU cluster B.
RPU core 0.
RPU core 1.
Image information data structure Id.
Boot PDI Info data structure Id.
PDI list data structure Id.
ATF handoff parameters data structure Id.
Image information data structure Id.
SHA3_1 device Id.
Data measure start.
Data measure update.
Data measure finish.

memberdef.name: XLOADER_GET_PDISRC_INFO
memberdef.initializer: {\ {"SBI", XLOADER_SBI_INDEX}, /* SBI JTAG - 0 */\ {"QSPI24", XLOADER_QSPI_INDEX}, /* QSPI24 - 1 */\ {"QSPI32", XLOADER_QSPI_INDEX}, /* QSPI32 - 2 */\ {"SDLS_B0", XLOADER_SD_INDEX}, /* SDLS_B0 - 3 */\ {"EMMC0", XLOADER_SD_INDEX}, /* EMMC0 - 4 */\ {"SD_B1", XLOADER_SD_INDEX}, /* SD_B1 - 5 */\ {"EMMC1", XLOADER_SD_INDEX}, /* EMMC - 6 */\ {"USB", XLOADER_USB_INDEX}, /* USB - 7 */\ {"OSPI", XLOADER_OSPI_INDEX}, /* OSPI - 8 */\ {"SBI", XLOADER_SBI_INDEX}, /* SBI - 9*/\ {"SMAP", XLOADER_SBI_INDEX}, /* SMAP - 0xA */\ {"PCIE", XLOADER_SBI_INDEX}, /* PCIE - 0xB */\ {"", XLOADER_INVALID_INDEX}, /* Unused - 0xC */\ {"", XLOADER_INVALID_INDEX}, /* Unused - 0xD */\ {"SDLS_B1", XLOADER_SD_INDEX}, /* SDLS_B1 - 0xE */\ {"DDR", XLOADER_DDR_INDEX}, /* DDR - 0xF */\ }

briefdescription.para: Get PDI source info.
0x1 - XLOADER_ERR_FAILURE
0x2 - Invalid ImgID passed in Command
0x3 - No Valid Image Found in the Image Info Table
0x4 - Image Info Table is Full
0x5 - Error on Parent Query while checking for Child Relation
0x6 - Error during memset on PdiPtr
0x7 - Error during memset on QspiPsuInstance
0x8 - Error during memset on SD BootFile
0x9 - Error during memset on SdInstance
0xA - Error during memset on UsbInstance
0xB - Error during memset on UsbPrivateData
0xC - Error during memset on DfuObj
0xD - Error when buffer size given by user is less than the metaheader length
0xE - Error when PDI given is not a full PDI or partial PDI
0xF - XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_PARAM
0x10 - Error when the destination buffer provided to store image info table is less than the current length of image info table
0x11 - Error when invalid source address is passed as a input to extract metaheader command
0x12 - Error when invalid destination address is passed as a input to extract metaheader command
0x13 - Error when the metaheader offset provided in full PDI is not present in DDR
0x14 - IDCODE mismatch
0x15 - EXTENDED IDCODE mismatch
0x16 - Invalid combination of EXTENDED IDCODE - Device
0x17 - Error when PdiList is empty
0x18 - Error when the PdiAddr that is being tried to remove does not exist in the PdiList
0x19 - Image Store configuration is not enabled/error
0x1A - Error when PdiList is full and user is trying to add a new Pdi
0x1B - Error when invalid destination address is passed for Readback PDI overriding
0x1C - Error when invalid Image Store Address is encountered
0x1D - Error when invalid Destination Address where Image Info Table to be copied is encountered
0x1E - Invalid Blocktype to Cframe data clear check
0x1F - CRAM self check failed as CFI CFrame is busy
0x20 - XLOADER_GLITCH_DETECTED.
0x21 - CFRAME CRC check failed
0x22 - Invalid destination address for copying ATF Handoff Parameters
0x23 - Invalid destination size for copying ATF Handoff Parameters
0x24 - Optional data associated with provided data ID is not found
0x25 - Error when buffer size given by user is less than the optional data length
0x26 - Error when copy of optional data to destination buffer failed
0x28 - Error when block type is invalid
0x29 - Error when frame address is not in the range
0x2A - Error when frame count added with start frame address exceeds last frame address
0x2B - Error when command given is not supported
0x2C - Error when Max ddr base addr
0x2D - Handshake process timeout
0x2E - I2c transaction error
0x2F - I2c bus busy error
0x30 - Error while releasing I2C device used for Handshake
0x31 - Error when PSM firmware is not found in optional data

detaileddescription.para: 0x32 - Error when invalid address range is detected.

briefdescription.para: 0x100 - Invalid JTAG/DAP config request
0x101 - Invalid DDR device id
0x102 - Pcomplete not done for given DDR device id
This function extends the image hashes of ROM and PLM data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful extension
error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the given NodeId is applicable for DFx.

parameterdescription.para: is Image ID

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the given PdiSrc is SD.

parameterdescription.para: is the source of Pdi

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check if the given PdiSrc is SD0.

parameterdescription.para: is the source of Pdi

briefdescription.para: This function checks if MJTAG workaround partition needs to be skipped.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to PDI instance

briefdescription.para: This function check conditions and perform internal POR for VP1802 and VP1502 device if required.
This function is used to run MJTAG solution workaround in which JTAG Tap state will be set to reset.
This function will sync the PDI load status with master.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to PDI instance

briefdescription.para: This function provides ImageInfoTbl pointer.

listitem.para: Pointer to ImageInfoTbl.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to start the subsystems in the PDI.

parameterdescription.para: Pdi instance pointer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A72_0 if waking up the A72-0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A72_1 if waking up the A72-1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_0 if waking up the R5-0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_1 if waking up the R5-1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_L if waking up the R5-L failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_PSM if waking up the PSM failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_CONFIG_SUBSYSTEM if subsystem peripheral pre-allocation fails during handoff.

parameterdescription.para: Pdi instance pointer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R52_0 if waking up the R52_0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R52_1 if waking up the R52_1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_0 if waking up the A78_0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_1 if waking up the A78_1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_2 if waking up the A78_2 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_3 if waking up the A78_3 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_ASU if waking up the ASU failed during handoff.

parameterdescription.para: Pdi instance pointer.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A72_0 if waking up the A72-0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A72_1 if waking up the A72-1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_0 if waking up the R5-0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_1 if waking up the R5-1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R5_L if waking up the R5-L failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_PSM if waking up the PSM failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_CONFIG_SUBSYSTEM if subsystem peripheral pre-allocation fails during handoff.

parameterdescription.para: Pdi instance pointer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R52_0 if waking up the R52_0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_R52_0 if waking up the R52_1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_0 if waking up the A78_0 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_1 if waking up the A78_1 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_2 if waking up the A78_2 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_A78_3 if waking up the A78_3 failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_WAKEUP_PSM if waking up the PSM failed during handoff.
XLOADER_ERR_CONFIG_SUBSYSTEM if subsystem peripheral pre-allocation fails during handoff.

inbodydescription.para: Pre-allocate peripheral devices to subsystem images now

listitem.para: Start Handoff to the cpus
Wake up each processor
Start Handoff to the cpus
Wake up each processor
Make Number of handoff CPUs to zero.

Wake up each processor

Wake up each processor

listitem.para: Start Handoff to the cpus
Wake up each processor

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get PdiSrc and PdiAddr for Secondary SD boot modes.

parameterdescription.para: is the secondary boot mode value
Pointer to PDI instance
Pointer to the source of PDI
is the pointer to the address of the Pdi

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_SEC_BOOT_MODE on unsupported secondary bootmode.

parameterdescription.para: is the secondary boot mode value
Pointer to the PDI instance
is pointer to the source of PDI
is the pointer to the address of the Pdi

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_SEC_BOOT_MODE on unsupported secondary bootmode.

parameterdescription.para: is the secondary boot mode value.
Pointer to PDI instance.
Pointer to the source of PDI.
is the pointer to the address of the Pdi.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_UNSUPPORTED_SEC_BOOT_MODE on unsupported secondary bootmode.
Get the PDI source address for the secondary boot device.
Get the PDI source address for the secondary boot device.
Get the PDI source address for the secondary boot device.
Get the PDI source address for the secondary boot device.
Get the PDI source address for the secondary boot device.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to update the handoff parameters.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_NUM_HANDOFF_CPUS when number of CPUs exceed max count.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_NUM_HANDOFF_CPUS if number of CPUs exceeds max count.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_NUM_HANDOFF_CPUS when number of CPUs exceed max count.
Get the destination CPU from the partition header.
Validate the destination CPU.
Update the CPU settings.
Assign the partition header to local variable
Update the CPU settings
Get the destination CPU from the partition header.
Validate the destination CPU.
Update the CPU settings.
Get the destination CPU from the partition header.
Validate the destination CPU.
Update the CPU settings.
Assign the partition header to local variable
Update the CPU settings

briefdescription.para: This function checks if MJTAG workaround is required.

listitem.para: XLOADER_ERR_DEFERRED_CDO_PROCESS on error while processing CDO but error is deferred till whole CDO processing is completed.

briefdescription.para: This function copies the elf partitions to specified destinations.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance
is pointer to the partition header
is pointer to the structure variable that contains parameters required to process the partition
is pointer to the instance containing security related params

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_ELF_LOAD_ADDR if the load address of the elf is invalid.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_PSM_PROC if device request for PSM is failed.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in lockstep mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in lockstep mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_TCM_ADDR on Invalid TCM address for A72 elfs.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID if invalid CPU id is selected.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance
is pointer to the partition header
is pointer to the structure variable that contains parameters required to process the partition
is pointer to the instance containing security related params

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_ELF_LOAD_ADDR if load address of the elf is invalid.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_R52_CLUSTER if invalid R52 cluster is selected.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID if invalid CPU id is selected.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance.
is pointer to the partition header.
is pointer to the structure variable that contains parameters required to process the partition.
is pointer to the instance containing security related params.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_ELF_LOAD_ADDR if the load address of the elf is invalid.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_PSM_PROC if device request for PSM is failed.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in lockstep mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in lockstep mode fails.

XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_TCM_ADDR on Invalid TCM address for A72 elfs.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID if invalid CPU id is selected.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance.
is pointer to the partition header.
is pointer to the structure variable that contains parameters required to process the partition.
is pointer to the instance containing security related params.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_ELF_LOAD_ADDR if the load address of the elf is invalid.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_PSM_PROC if device request for PSM is failed.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_SPLIT if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in split mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU0_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU0 in lockstep mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_IOCTL_RPU1_LOCKSTEP if IOCTL call to set RPU1 in lockstep mode fails.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_TCM_ADDR on Invalid TCM address for A72 elfs.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance
is pointer to the partition header
is pointer to the structure variable that contains parameters required to process the partition
is pointer to the instance containing security related params

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_ELF_LOAD_ADDR if load address of the elf is invalid.
XLOADER_ERR_PM_DEV_PSM_PROC if device request for PSM is failed.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_R52_CLUSTER if invalid R52 cluster is selected.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_CPUID if invalid CPU id is selected.
Validate the destination CPU to ensure it's a supported type
For PSM, PSM should be taken out of reset before loading. PSM RAM should be ECC initialized
For OCM, RAM should be ECC initialized
R5 should be taken out of reset before loading. R5 TCM should be ECC initialized
Verify the load address.
Copy the partition to the load address.
Populate handoff parameters to ATF. These correspond to the partitions of application which ATF will be loading.

inbodydescription.para: Check if TCM Boot Bit is set

listitem.para: Verify the load address.
For OCM, RAM should be ECC initialized
R5 should be taken out of reset before loading. R5 TCM should be ECC initialized
Copy the partition to the load address.
Populate handoff parameters to ATF. These correspond to the partitions of application which ATF will be loading.
Validate the destination CPU to ensure it's a supported type
For PSM, PSM should be taken out of reset before loading. PSM RAM should be ECC initialized.
For OCM, RAM should be ECC initialized.
R5 should be taken out of reset before loading. R5 TCM should be ECC initialized.
Verify the load address.
Copy the partition to the load address.
Populate handoff parameters to ATF. These correspond to the partitions of application which ATF will be loading.
Verify the load address.
Validate the destination CPU to ensure it's a supported type
For PSM, PSM should be taken out of reset before loading. PSM RAM should be ECC initialized.
For OCM, RAM should be ECC initialized.
R5 should be taken out of reset before loading. R5 TCM should be ECC initialized.
Copy the partition to the load address.
Populate handoff parameters to ATF. These correspond to the partitions of application which ATF will be loading.

inbodydescription.para: Check if TCM Boot Bit is set

listitem.para: Verify the load address.
For PSM, PSM should be taken out of reset before loading. PSM RAM should be ECC initialized
For OCM, RAM should be ECC initialized
R5 should be taken out of reset before loading. R5 TCM should be ECC initialized
Copy the partition to the load address.
Populate handoff parameters to ATF. These correspond to the partitions of application which ATF will be loading.

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to PdiList.

listitem.para: Pointer to PdiList.

briefdescription.para: This function provides update handler for xilloader.

parameterdescription.para: is the module operation variable

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

listitem.para: Disable SBI Interrupt
Add Scheduler tasks if they are removed during shutdown init
Disable SBI Interrupt
Add Scheduler tasks if they are removed during shutdown init

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the loader with platform specific initializations.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS always.
XST_SUCCESS on success.
Error code on failure.

briefdescription.para: This function measures the PDI's meta header data by calculating the hash using SHA3.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to PDI instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_HDR_MEASUREMENT if error in meta header measurement.

briefdescription.para: This function measures the data by calculating SHA3 hash.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XLoader_ImageMeasureInfo structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successfully measuring the data
XLOADER_ERR_DATA_MEASUREMENT if error in data measurement.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XLoader_ImageMeasureInfo structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_DATA_MEASUREMENT if error in data measurement.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XLoader_ImageMeasureInfo structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on successfully measuring the data.
XLOADER_ERR_DATA_MEASUREMENT if error in data measurement.

briefdescription.para: This function measures the Secure Configuration that is SPK, SPK ID and Encryption Revoke ID and extends to the specified PCR.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
Provides the PCR number and Measurement Index to be extended.
Pointer to the DigestIndex across the PCR
TRUE or FALSE to overwrite the extended digest or not

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_SECURE_CONFIG_MEASUREMENT if error in Secure config measurement.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
provides the PCR number and Measurement Index to be extended.
is pointer to the DigestIndex across the PCR.
TRUE or FALSE to overwrite the extended digest or not.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_SECURE_CONFIG_MEASUREMENT if error in Secure config measurement.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the XLoader_SecureParams instance.
provides the PCR number and Measurement Index to be extended.
is pointer to the DigestIndex across the PCR
TRUE or FALSE to overwrite the extended digest or not

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_SECURE_CONFIG_MEASUREMENT if error in Secure config measurement.

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to BootPDI Info.

listitem.para: pointer to BootPDI Info.

briefdescription.para: This function enables or disable Jtag Access Command payload parameters are.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_INVALID_JTAG_OPERATION
Unlock the PMC_TAP registers
Lock the PMC_TAP registers

briefdescription.para: This function reads DDR crypto performance counters of given DDR device id.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
ErrorCode on Failure.

briefdescription.para: This function will load the LPD and PSM ELF file from DDR.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
Error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: Initialize the PDI to load the LPD subsystem from DDR.
Check if LPD is present in InPlacePLM PDI and get the Image number and Partition number. If LPD is not found, return error.
We need to reset NoOfHandOffCpus here because we don't call StartImage routine

briefdescription.para: This function checks and updates the secure state configuration.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
Error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function measures the partition hashes.

detaileddescription.para: This function measures the partition hashes from the hash block.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_DATA_MEASUREMENT if error in data measurement.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to XilPdi instance.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
XLOADER_ERR_DATA_MEASUREMENT if error in data measurement.

inbodydescription.para: Start the measurement with the partition hash's present in HashBlock
For versal_2ve_2vm, sha_pmxc driver requires notification before the last ShaUpate. Set the flag accordingly for the last partition.
Set Last word of DMA, by setting IsLastUpdate true

briefdescription.para: This Function does the following:

listitem.para: It resets the SHA instance 1.
It puts the SHA instance 1 into initialized state.

inbodydescription.para: Set SHA under reset on failure condition
Put the SHA instance 1 into initialized state

briefdescription.para: This function updates the partition data to SHA engine for data measurement only if authentication or checksum is not enabled.

detaileddescription.para: This functions updates the partition data to SHA engine for measurement.
If authentication or checksum is enabled, nothing needs to be done as SHA engine would be in use for the authentication/checksum process.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilPdi structure.
Address of Data for measure the hash.
Length of data for DataMeasument.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilPdi structure.
Address of Data for measure the hash.
Length of data for DataMeasument.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success.
Error code on failure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XilPdi structure.
Address of Data for measure the hash.
Length of data for DataMeasument.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

inbodydescription.para: Nothing needs to be done in case, PLM_TPM is not defined
Nothing needs to be done in case, PLM_OCP is not defined
Nothing needs to be done in case, PLM_OCP is not defined
